sys_script.name: Save Attachment to Parent

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_bc38929d934847100cbd35befaba101a
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>true</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>false</action_update><active>false</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>sys_attachment</collection><condition>current.table_name == 'x_1909471_inspec_0_device'</condition><description/><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>Save Attachment to Parent</name><order>100</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous /*null when async*/) {

    // Get the child record
    var child = new GlideRecord(current.table_name);
    if (!child.get(current.table_sys_id)) {
        return;
    }

    // Make sure parent exists
    if (!child.parent) {
        return;
    }

    // Copy attachment to parent
    var attachment = new GlideSysAttachment();
    attachment.copy(
        current.table_name,   // child table
        child.sys_id,         // child record
        'x_1909471_inspec_0_order',  // parent table
        child.parent          // parent sys_id
    );

})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-03 21:30:26</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>bc38929d934847100cbd35befaba101a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Save Attachment to Parent</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="Inspect 2026" source="x_1909471_inspec_0">2f3eba82935fba100cbd35befaba10fe</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Inspect 2026">2f3eba82935fba100cbd35befaba10fe</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_bc38929d934847100cbd35befaba101a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-10 20:45:44</sys_updated_on><template/><when>after</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=bc38929d934847100cbd35befaba101a"/></record_update>
